# AWX OpenAPI Schema (Vendored)

This directory stores a pinned copy of the AWX OpenAPI schema used as a local reference while building the provider.

- Source: `https://s3.amazonaws.com/awx-public-ci-files/awx/devel/schema.json`
- Retrieved: `2026-02-09`
- File: `schema.json`
- SHA256: `20c74f56af1ef609c301ad73509be2fe22bbcef20add335f69956b37e71e3cca`

## Refresh

Run:

```bash
./external/awx-openapi/update.sh
```

After refreshing, update this file's retrieval date and SHA256 value.
